title: Roasted Monsoon Delight
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish, perfect for a weeknight dinner. Roasted Monsoon is a staple in many cuisines, and when paired with ghee and spices, it becomes a treat.
instructions: Rinse the Monsoon and trim the ends.
Drizzle ghee over the Monsoon and sprinkle salt and black pepper to taste.
Toss to coat evenly and roast in the oven for 25-30 minutes.
After 25-30 minutes, remove from oven and let cool slightly.
